caseText: Someone stole my gold while I was away.
He hit and pushed another person; the victim later died.

reasons.IPC 302: Death occurred after assault; check intent.

followUps: Was there intent to cause death (yes/no)?

caseText: He hit and pushed another person; the victim later died.

laws.desc: Culpable Homicide not amounting to Murder

reasons.IPC 304: Culpable homicide may apply where intent to kill is not established.
reasons.IPC 304A: If death resulted from negligent act causing death without culpable intent.

followUps: Was there intent or weapon used (yes/no)?

caseText: Someone killed a person in a fight and left the scene.

laws.desc: Culpable Homicide not amounting to Murder

reasons.IPC 302: Used when death was caused with intent or knowledge; primary section for killing.
reasons.IPC 300: Check whether elements amount to murder; helps decide between 302 and 304.
reasons.IPC 304: Used when death resulted but mens rea for murder is absent or reduced.
reasons.IPC 307: If the victim survived or there was an attempt to kill.

reasons.caseText: There was a robbery and my phone was stolen from the market.

reasons.IPC 390: Robbery indicated by use or threat of force to take property.
reasons.IPC 378: If no force or threat was used it may be theft rather than robbery.

reasons.notes: Robbery vs theft — check for force/violence

reasons.caseText: A person hacked my bank account and transferred money out of it.

reasons.IT Act Section 66: Description indicates unauthorized access to computer systems or accounts.

followUps: Were you given any suspicious links (yes/no)?
reasons.notes: Example: bank account hacked and funds transferred

reasons.caseText: Someone gained unauthorized access to my online banking and withdrew funds.

reasons.IT Act Section 66: Funds removed after unauthorized access to online banking.

followUps: Was MFA enabled on your account (yes/no)?

reasons.caseText: My email account was hacked and used to request money from my contacts.

reasons.IT Act Section 66: Email unauthorized access and misuse for fraud.

reasons.notes: Example: email hacked and used for fraud

reasons.caseText: A hacker stole money from my internet banking after obtaining my password.

reasons.IT Act Section 66: Unauthorized access to banking leading to theft.

followUps: Did the bank refund any amount (yes/no)?
Were there unfamiliar devices listed in login history?
reasons.notes: Example: credential compromise leads to theft

reasons.caseText: My UPI account was compromised and money was withdrawn without my consent.

reasons.IT Act Section 66: Unauthorized transactions through compromised payment app.

followUps: Was your phone SIM swapped recently (yes/no)?
Did you share OTP or password with anyone?

reasons.caseText: A person broke into my house and stole my gold jewelry.

reasons.IPC 380: Theft reported from a dwelling (owner absent).
reasons.IPC 457: Evidence of house-trespass or breaking in.

reasons.caseText: My motorcycle was stolen from the parking area.

reasons.IPC 378: Vehicle taken without consent indicates theft.

reasons.caseText: Someone stole my mobile phone while I was traveling on a bus.
A person hacked my bank account and transferred money without my permission.

reasons.IT Act Section 66: Unauthorized access to online banking; funds transferred.

followUps: Did the bank refund any amount (yes/no)?

reasons.caseText: Someone gained unauthorized access to my email account and changed the password.

laws.desc: Identity theft / misuse of personal data

followUps: Any funds or messages sent using the account?

reasons.caseText: I received a phishing link and my UPI account was emptied.

reasons.IPC 420: Fraudulently induced to authorize transactions via deception.

followUps: Did you click a link or share OTP (yes/no)?

reasons.caseText: A hacker used my social media account to scam my friends.

laws.desc: Cheating by personation using a computer resource

reasons.IT Act Section 66D: Impersonation and fraudulent communication via social media.

followUps: When did the account get compromised?

reasons.caseText: A person posted false allegations about me on social media, damaging my reputation.

reasons.IPC 500: False statements published causing reputational harm (criminal defamation).

reasons.caseText: My colleague spread false rumors that caused me to lose clients.

reasons.IPC 500: False statements causing reputational and commercial loss.

reasons.caseText: My neighbor physically attacked me during an argument.
followUps: Any medical records or photos of injuries (yes/no)?

reasons.caseText: A group of people assaulted me and caused serious injuries.

laws.desc: Punishment for voluntarily causing grievous hurt
Acts done by several persons in furtherance of common intention

reasons.IPC 325: Injuries amount to grievous hurt; consider multiple assailants.

reasons.caseText: A real estate agent took my money and disappeared without providing the promised property.

reasons.IPC 420: Payment taken by false promise; may be cheating.

reasons.caseText: An online seller accepted payment but never delivered the product.
defenses: Delivery failure due to third party

reasons.caseText: My spouse has been physically and mentally abusing me for several months.

laws.code: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act

reasons.IPC 498A: Allegations of cruelty and harassment within marriage.

followUps: Any medical records or police complaints (yes/no)?

reasons.caseText: My neighbor illegally occupied a portion of my land and refuses to vacate it.

laws.desc: Civil remedy for trespass / recovery of possession

reasons.Civil suit - Property: Dispute over land possession; civil suit recommended.

reasons.caseText: Someone forged my signature and transferred ownership of my property.

reasons.IPC 467: Forgery of documents leading to transfer of property.

followUps: Do you have original title deeds (yes/no)?

reasons.caseText: A fake investment company collected money from hundreds of people and vanished.

reasons.IPC 420: Large-scale fraud and false promises to investors.

reasons.caseText: My employer terminated me after I reported corruption in the organization.

reasons.Labour law remedy: Employment and administrative remedies may apply; consider labour court or employment tribunal.

reasons.caseText: A person created a fake profile using my photos and personal information.

laws.desc: Identity theft / misuse of personal data

reasons.IT Act Section 66C: Unauthorized use of personal data and identity.

followUps: Any messages sent from that profile?

reasons.caseText: Someone threatened me over the phone and demanded money.

laws.desc: Putting in fear of death or grievous hurt, extortion

reasons.IPC 383: Threats coupled with demand for money indicate extortion.

followUps: Do you have call records or recordings (yes/no)?

reasons.caseText: My manager repeatedly sent inappropriate messages and made unwanted advances.

reasons.POSH Act / IPC 354A: Workplace sexual harassment allegations; consider POSH internal complaint mechanism and criminal remedies.

reasons.caseText: A child was taken away without the parents' consent.

laws.desc: Kidnapping or abducting with intent to murder

reasons.IPC 363: Removal of a child without consent indicates kidnapping.

reasons.caseText: Police found illegal narcotics in a person's possession.

laws.code: Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act

reasons.NDPS: Possession or trafficking of controlled substances under NDPS Act.

reasons.caseText: A drunk driver caused a serious road accident.

reasons.IPC 304A: Death caused by negligent driving (no intent to kill).

followUps: Was the driver tested for alcohol (yes/no)?
reasons.notes: Traffic accident due to alleged drunk driving

reasons.caseText: A surgeon operated on the wrong body part causing harm.

laws.desc: Causing death by negligence (if death occurred)
Civil claim for damages and professional negligence

reasons.Medical Negligence - Civil: Medical negligence claim; civil remedies may apply; criminal negligence possible depending on harm.
